clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzi/Alfiere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzi/Cavallo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzi/Pedone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzi/Re.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzi/Regina.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzi/Torre.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Giocatore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Gioco.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/resource_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/sprite_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/stb_image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/texture.cpp.o -o Scacchi  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL
